title: Tiger Team: The Mountain of the 1000 Dragons
original_title: Tiger Team - Der Berg der 1000 Drachen
overview: The Viennese detective children Biggi, Patrick and Luke find a key in dragon form, and their curiosity is aroused. They  realize that the sinister Lady Q is interested in opening the legendary moon palace and find the elixir which is believed that promises eternal youth. The Tigers must prevent that Lady Q enters into possession of the priceless liquid.
